name: opc-marketplace
description: Caffeine's one-person company plugin marketplace — 18 agents, 13 skills, 2 hooks covering the full product lifecycle

plugins.name: opc-founder
plugins.description: Founder agent that orchestrates cross-stage agent teams for the entire product lifecycle

plugins.name: product-kit
plugins.description: Product stage — /research, /requirement, /brainstorm skills + product agent + startup analyst

plugins.name: design-kit
plugins.description: Design stage — /ui-design skill + UX agent + UI agent + ui-ux-designer reference

plugins.name: dev-kit
plugins.description: Dev stage — /architect, /code-review, /openapi-spec skills + frontend/backend/security/mobile/database agents + auto-lint hook

plugins.name: ship-kit
plugins.description: Ship stage — 6 skills (/deploy, /ci-pipeline, /changelog, /cost-opt, /incident-runbook, /terraform) + devops/cloud-architect/incident-responder agents + pre-deploy hook

plugins.name: docs-kit
plugins.description: Document generation kit — /docx, /pdf, /pptx skills + docs-agent for professional document creation
